# Korbey Lague PLLP

> Korbey Lague PLLP is a full-service CPA firm headquartered in Tyngsborough, MA, led by two CPA partners — Kelsey Korbey, CPA, and Ron Lague, CPA, PFS — and a team of nine. The firm's tagline, "Inspired by your success," reflects a year-round advisory model that goes well beyond tax season. They serve individuals, healthcare professionals, contractors, nonprofits, service-based businesses, and startups, offering bookkeeping packages, virtual CFO services, payroll, financial reporting, and nonprofit accounting — with Sage Intacct as a technology partner.
